mapper.insert: insert into coupon (coupon_code, discount, coupon_end, coupon_max, coupon_info, id,coupon_type, coupon_catagory) values ( #{coupon_code}, #{discount}, #{coupon_end}, #{coupon_max}, #{coupon_info}, #{id},#{coupon_type}, #{coupon_catagory})
mapper.select: SELECT coupon_code, discount, coupon_end, coupon_max, coupon_info, coupon_used, id, coupon_type, coupon_catagory FROM coupon WHERE id = coupon_code
SELECT coupon_code, discount, coupon_end, coupon_max, coupon_info, coupon_used, coupon_type, coupon_catagory, id FROM coupon WHERE id = #{id} AND coupon_end >= SYSDATE

SELECT coupon_code, discount, coupon_end, coupon_max, coupon_info, coupon_used, coupon_type, coupon_catagory, id FROM coupon
( ( coupon_type = 'company' AND coupon_catagory = #{c_id} )
OR
( coupon_type = 'catagory' AND coupon_catagory = #{catagory} )
OR
( coupon_type = 'all' ) )
AND id = coupon_code AND coupon_end >= SYSDATE AND NVL(coupon_used, 'N') = 'N'

SELECT coupon_code, discount, coupon_end, coupon_max, coupon_info, coupon_used, coupon_type, coupon_catagory, id FROM coupon WHERE coupon_code = #{coupon_code} AND id = #{id} AND coupon_end >= SYSDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET discount = #{discount}, coupon_end = #{coupon_end}, coupon_max = #{coupon_max}, coupon_info = #{coupon_info}, id = #{id} WHERE coupon_code = #{coupon_code}
mapper.select: SELECT coupon_code, discount, coupon_end, coupon_max, coupon_info, coupon_used, coupon_type, coupon_catagory, id FROM coupon WHERE id = #{id} AND coupon_code = #{coupon_code} AND coupon_end >= SYSDATE AND NVL(coupon_used, 'N') = 'N'

SELECT coupon_code, discount, coupon_end, coupon_max, coupon_info, coupon_used, coupon_type, coupon_catagory, id
from coupon
where id = #{id}
and coupon_end >=sysdate
and nvl(coupon_used,'N') = 'N'
